## What type of document is this?

- [ ] PRD (new or updated)
- [ ] Decision Record
- [ ] Research / Supporting Doc

---

## PRD Checklist

_Skip this section if not a PRD._

- [ ] Uses template from `docs/templates/prd-template.md`
- [ ] File named `YYYY-MM-DD_short-description.md` in `prds/`
- [ ] Problem statement is clear and specific
- [ ] Job stories follow "When / I want / So I can" format
- [ ] Success metrics have specific numbers
- [ ] Scope section includes Out-of-Scope items
- [ ] Status field is set to "In-Review"

## Decision Record Checklist

_Skip this section if not a decision record._

- [ ] Context explains the situation clearly
- [ ] Decision is stated concisely
- [ ] Alternatives considered are listed with reasons for rejection
- [ ] Consequences include both benefits AND trade-offs

## Research Checklist

_Skip this section if not research._

- [ ] Linked to relevant PRD or decision
- [ ] Sources cited

---

## Summary

_Brief description of what this document covers and why it matters._

---

See [Workflow](docs/workflow.md) for merge process and [Writing Guide](docs/writing-guide.md) for how to write effective documents.
